steps.summary: Baseline fixed: preflight PASS, local-rag focused gate PASS, pytest 176 passed, lexical/hybrid retrieval measured, full hierarchical/reranked benchmark timed out and is queued for RQ2/RQ3 split.

Coverage refresh fixed: goldset has 50 items across 14 standards, but enforced answer gate is only Q019-Q023; retrieval benchmark covers 50 items but needs split due timeout; RQ3 candidate miss list prepared.

Failure taxonomy fixed: true first-stage misses, cross-concept multi-query candidates, reporting misinterpretation, timeout/operability, and coverage metadata gaps are separated; RQ4 scope set to per-retriever miss reporting plus gate policy.

Retrieval reporting upgraded: miss_summary_by_retriever now prints misses per retriever, tests added, lexical/hybrid retrieval output verified, and gate policy separates always-on from slow diagnostic benchmarks.
Quality gate report fixed: mandatory gates, diagnostic slow gates, private/local boundaries, and next-horizon entry conditions are documented; rag-quality-refresh can close.
